'''ât-p-w''' ('''katapaw''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quander|quander]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quander|quander]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| katapaw
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitapaw|thitapaw]] || [[word:jitapaw|jitapaw]] || [[word:shitapaw|shitapaw]] || [[word:kitapaw|kitapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutapaw|thuthutapaw]] || [[word:jujutapaw|jujutapaw]] || [[word:shushutapaw|shushutapaw]] || [[word:kukutapaw|kukutapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutapaw|thutapaw]] || [[word:jutapaw|jutapaw]] || [[word:shutapaw|shutapaw]] || [[word:kutapaw|kutapaw]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutapaw|thutapaw]] || [[word:jutapaw|jutapaw]] || [[word:shutapaw|shutapaw]] || [[word:kutapaw|kutapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetapaw|thetapaw]] || [[word:jetapaw|jetapaw]] || [[word:shetapaw|shetapaw]] || [[word:ketapaw|ketapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotapaw|thothotapaw]] || [[word:jojotapaw|jojotapaw]] || [[word:shoshotapaw|shoshotapaw]] || [[word:kokotapaw|kokotapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotapaw|thotapaw]] || [[word:jotapaw|jotapaw]] || [[word:shotapaw|shotapaw]] || [[word:kotapaw|kotapaw]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotapaw|thotapaw]] || [[word:jotapaw|jotapaw]] || [[word:shotapaw|shotapaw]] || [[word:kotapaw|kotapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtapaw|thĂŠtapaw]] || [[word:jĂŠtapaw|jĂŠtapaw]] || [[word:shĂŠtapaw|shĂŠtapaw]] || [[word:kĂŠtapaw|kĂŠtapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatapaw|thathatapaw]] || [[word:jajatapaw|jajatapaw]] || [[word:shashatapaw|shashatapaw]] || [[word:kakatapaw|kakatapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatapaw|thatapaw]] || [[word:jatapaw|jatapaw]] || [[word:shatapaw|shatapaw]] || [[word:katapaw|katapaw]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatapaw|thatapaw]] || [[word:jatapaw|jatapaw]] || [[word:shatapaw|shatapaw]] || [[word:katapaw|katapaw]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatapaw|shatapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatapaw|goshatapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatapaw|gokishatapaw]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatapawnĂŒ|shatapawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatapawnknĂŒ|goshatapawnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatapawnĂŒ|gokishatapawnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatapawshĂ«|shatapawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatapawnkshĂ«|goshatapawnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatapawshĂ«|gokishatapawshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatapawro|shatapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatapawnkro|goshatapawnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatapawro|gokishatapawro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatapawmu|shatapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatapawnkmu|goshatapawnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatapawmu|gokishatapawmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatapawsher|shatapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatapawnksher|goshatapawnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatapawsher|gokishatapawsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatapawng|shatapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatapawnkng|goshatapawnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatapawng|gokishatapawng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatapawya|shatapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatapawnkya|goshatapawnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatapawya|gokishatapawya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatapawyam|shatapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatapawnkyam|goshatapawnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatapawyam|gokishatapawyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatapawnĂŒshĂ«|shatapawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatapawnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatapawnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatapawnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatapawnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatapawnĂŒro|shatapawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatapawnknĂŒro|goshatapawnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatapawnĂŒro|gokishatapawnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatapawnĂŒmu|shatapawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatapawnknĂŒmu|goshatapawnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatapawnĂŒmu|gokishatapawnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatapawshĂ«nĂŒ|shatapawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatapawnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatapawnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatapawshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatapawshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatapawshĂ«ro|shatapawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatapawnkshĂ«ro|goshatapawnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatapawshĂ«ro|gokishatapawshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatapawshĂ«mu|shatapawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatapawnkshĂ«mu|goshatapawnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatapawshĂ«mu|gokishatapawshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatapawronĂŒ|shatapawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatapawnkronĂŒ|goshatapawnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatapawronĂŒ|gokishatapawronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatapawroshĂ«|shatapawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatapawnkroshĂ«|goshatapawnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatapawroshĂ«|gokishatapawroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatapawromu|shatapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatapawnkromu|goshatapawnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatapawromu|gokishatapawromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatapawmunĂŒ|shatapawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatapawnkmunĂŒ|goshatapawnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatapawmunĂŒ|gokishatapawmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatapawmushĂ«|shatapawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatapawnkmushĂ«|goshatapawnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatapawmushĂ«|gokishatapawmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatapawmuro|shatapawmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatapawnkmuro|goshatapawnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatapawmuro|gokishatapawmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
